title: List skills
summary: List built-in, imported, and custom uploaded Skills available to agents.

response.name: data
response.description: Skill descriptors with source and version metadata.

title: Create skill
summary: Upload a reusable Skill package. A valid package contains one top-level folder with SKILL.md at its root.

parameters.name: files
parameters.description: Zip, .skill file, directory upload, or JSON file list.

parameters.name: display_title
parameters.description: Optional human label not included in model prompts.

response.name: id
response.description: Server-generated skill_... identifier for custom uploads.

title: Get skill
summary: Fetch one Skill descriptor and package metadata.

title: Delete skill
summary: Delete or archive a custom uploaded Skill from the local workspace.

response.name: deleted
response.description: True when the Skill was removed.
